chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sale of Pasture, Crops, Trees, Lands, Servants, Water Rights, and Real Estate

text: 3872 - وَ قَضَى عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي أَهْلِ اَلْبَوَادِي أَنْ لاَ يَمْنَعُوا فَضْلَ مَاءٍ وَ لاَ يَبِيعُوا فَضْلَ اَلْكَلَإِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3872 - Imam (as) ruled concerning the people of the desert that they should neither withhold surplus water nor sell excess pasture.
